/** * References * - https://compat-table.github.io/compat-table/es6/ * - MDN */ export declare enum Feature { AggregateError = 1, ArrowFunction = 2, ErrorPrototypeStack = 4, ObjectAssign = 8, BigIntTypedArray = 16, RegExp = 32 } export declare const ALL_ENABLED: number; //# sourceMappingURL=compat.d.ts.map
